case_title: BADARACCO, ANTONIO vs. CHAU, KIEN HOA et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BADARACCO, ANTONIO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHAU, KIEN HOA TANG, CUONG HON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 186 LELAND AVE, LEASE FORFEITED
